title: How Deutsche Telekom is rewiring telecommunications with AI
author: openai-blog
raw_description: How Deutsche Telekom is becoming an AI-native telco with OpenAI-transforming customer service, employee workflows, network operations, and the future of voice.
summary: 德国电信正利用OpenAI技术转型为AI原生电信公司，涵盖客户服务、员工工作流、网络运营及语音未来。
analysis_note: 展示了AI在传统行业的深度应用，但技术细节较少，偏向商业案例。
